options.label: Balanced
options.desc: Full 760-stop network (all 2,950 ERP riders, incl. 80 recovered stops). All 71 buses used, owned-near/rental-far split. The default operating plan.

options.label: Cost-lean (old network)
options.desc: OLD 680-stop / 2,727-rider network — predates the 80 recovered stops. Kept for reference until the cost-lean variant is re-solved on the full network.
